description: WAF-RCE-Detect: Block RCE/SSRF/Log4Shell markers (URL-decoded query or User-Agent)
expression: (url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "${jndi:" or http.user_agent contains "${jndi:" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "classLoader" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "ognl" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "169.254.169.254" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "metadata.google.internal" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "file://")

description: WAF-Recon-Log: Log scanner/AIO recon + sensitive-path probes (behavioral — flows through)
expression: (http.user_agent contains "sqlmap" or http.user_agent contains "nikto" or http.user_agent contains "nuclei" or http.user_agent contains "python-requests" or http.request.uri.path in {"/.env" "/.git/HEAD" "/api/v1/admin" "/api/v1/training-data"})

description: WAF-ConciergeInjection-Log: Log prompt-injection posts to the concierge (behavioral)
WAF-BotChallenge (DISABLED by default): Managed Challenge on /chat + /login. Enable for a real drop-day; left off so it does not pre-empt the CTF concierge/credential-stuffing boxes.
